Misconfigurations.Title: No HEALTHCHECK defined
Misconfigurations.Description: You should add HEALTHCHECK instruction in your docker container images to perform the health check on running containers.
Misconfigurations.Message: Add HEALTHCHECK instruction in your Dockerfile

Misconfigurations.Title: Image tag ":latest" used
Misconfigurations.Description: It is best to avoid using the ':latest' image tag when deploying containers in production. Doing so makes it hard to track which version of the image is running, and hard to roll back the version.
Misconfigurations.Message: Container 'web' of Deployment 'web-${COLOR}' should specify an image tag
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Use a specific container image tag that is not 'latest'.

Misconfigurations.Title: Runs with UID <= 10000
Misconfigurations.Description: Force the container to run with user ID > 10000 to avoid conflicts with the host’s user table.

Misconfigurations.Title: Runs with GID <= 10000
Misconfigurations.Description: Force the container to run with group ID > 10000 to avoid conflicts with the host’s user table.

Misconfigurations.Title: Runs with UID <= 10000
Misconfigurations.Description: Force the container to run with user ID > 10000 to avoid conflicts with the host’s user table.

Misconfigurations.Title: Runs with GID <= 10000
Misconfigurations.Description: Force the container to run with group ID > 10000 to avoid conflicts with the host’s user table.

Misconfigurations.Title: Manage Kubernetes workloads and pods
Misconfigurations.Description: Depending on the policies enforced by the admission controller, this permission ranges from the ability to steal compute (crypto) by running workloads or allowing for creating workloads that escape to the node as root and escalation to cluster-admin.
Misconfigurations.Message: Role 'pod-deployer-role' should not have access to resources ["pods", "deployments", "jobs", "cronjobs", "statefulsets", "daemonsets", "replicasets", "replicationcontrollers"] for verbs ["create", "update", "patch", "delete", "deletecollection", "impersonate", "*"]
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Kubernetes workloads resources are only allowed for verbs 'list', 'watch', 'get'

Misconfigurations.Title: Manage Kubernetes networking
Misconfigurations.Description: The ability to control which pods get service traffic directed to them allows for interception attacks. Controlling network policy allows for bypassing lateral movement restrictions.
Misconfigurations.Message: Role 'pod-deployer-role' should not have access to resources ["services", "endpoints", "endpointslices", "networkpolicies", "ingresses"] for verbs ["create", "update", "patch", "delete", "deletecollection", "impersonate", "*"]
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Networking resources are only allowed for verbs 'list', 'watch', 'get'

Misconfigurations.Title: Manage Kubernetes networking
Misconfigurations.Description: The ability to control which pods get service traffic directed to them allows for interception attacks. Controlling network policy allows for bypassing lateral movement restrictions.
Misconfigurations.Message: Role 'pod-deployer-role' should not have access to resources ["services", "endpoints", "endpointslices", "networkpolicies", "ingresses"] for verbs ["create", "update", "patch", "delete", "deletecollection", "impersonate", "*"]
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Networking resources are only allowed for verbs 'list', 'watch', 'get'

Misconfigurations.Title: Manage namespace secrets
Misconfigurations.Description: Viewing secrets at the namespace scope can lead to escalation if another service account in that namespace has a higher privileged rolebinding or clusterrolebinding bound.
Misconfigurations.Message: Role 'pod-deployer-role' shouldn't have access to manage secrets in namespace 'cb'
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Manage namespace secrets are not allowed. Remove resource 'secrets' from role

Misconfigurations.Title: Ensure AKS logging to Azure Monitoring is Configured
Misconfigurations.Description: Ensure AKS logging to Azure Monitoring is configured for containers to monitor the performance of workloads.
Misconfigurations.Message: Cluster does not have logging enabled via OMS Agent.

Misconfigurations.Title: Ensure AKS has an API Server Authorized IP Ranges enabled
Misconfigurations.Description: The API server is the central way to interact with and manage a cluster. To improve cluster security and minimize attacks, the API server should only be accessible from a limited set of IP address ranges.
Misconfigurations.Message: Cluster does not limit API access to specific IP addresses.
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Limit the access to the API server to a limited IP range

Misconfigurations.Title: No HEALTHCHECK defined
Misconfigurations.Description: You should add HEALTHCHECK instruction in your docker container images to perform the health check on running containers.
Misconfigurations.Message: Add HEALTHCHECK instruction in your Dockerfile

Misconfigurations.Title: Key vault should have the network acl block specified
Misconfigurations.Description:
Network ACLs allow you to reduce your exposure to risk by limiting what can access your key vault. 

The default action of the Network ACL should be set to deny for when IPs are not matched. Azure services can be allowed to bypass.
Misconfigurations.Message: Vault network ACL does not block access by default.
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Set a network ACL for the key vault

Misconfigurations.Title: Key vault should have purge protection enabled
Misconfigurations.Description:
Purge protection is an optional Key Vault behavior and is not enabled by default.

Purge protection can only be enabled once soft-delete is enabled. It can be turned on via CLI or PowerShell.
Misconfigurations.Message: Vault does not have purge protection enabled.
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Enable purge protection for key vaults

Misconfigurations.Title: Ensure AKS logging to Azure Monitoring is Configured
Misconfigurations.Description: Ensure AKS logging to Azure Monitoring is configured for containers to monitor the performance of workloads.
Misconfigurations.Message: Cluster does not have logging enabled via OMS Agent.

Misconfigurations.Title: Ensure AKS has an API Server Authorized IP Ranges enabled
Misconfigurations.Description: The API server is the central way to interact with and manage a cluster. To improve cluster security and minimize attacks, the API server should only be accessible from a limited set of IP address ranges.
Misconfigurations.Message: Cluster does not limit API access to specific IP addresses.
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Limit the access to the API server to a limited IP range

Misconfigurations.Title: Ensure RBAC is enabled on AKS clusters
Misconfigurations.Description: Using Kubernetes role-based access control (RBAC), you can grant users, groups, and service accounts access to only the resources they need.

Misconfigurations.Title: Ensure AKS cluster has Network Policy configured
Misconfigurations.Description: The Kubernetes object type NetworkPolicy should be defined to have opportunity allow or block traffic to pods, as in a Kubernetes cluster configured with default settings, all pods can discover and communicate with each other without any restrictions.
Misconfigurations.Message: Kubernetes cluster does not have a network policy set.
